title: C92 — Tarski ↔ Φ_inference: existence-leak is the Tarski-undefinability instance loading on Φ_in…

story.text:
# C92
**Tarski ↔ Φ_inference: existence-leak is the Tarski-undefinability instance loading on Φ_inference; feasibility-truth escapes containment across systems and accumulates across observers; D(X) monotone non-increasing in corroborating systems. Absorbs the Gödelian seed (existence as positive provability). Rides on C81; cannot exceed its base.**

*Confidence:* ~70% · *Status:* active · registered Run 8, 2026-06-28 · conjectural · capped at C81's base · *Register:* core
*Home:* limitative-theorems-and-privacy-is-value.md §3, §4

Band IX · The Limitative Reading · registered Run 8, 2026-06-28 (Gate G6)
